# pangolin_site (Resource)

Manages a Pangolin site (tunnel connector).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_site" "example" {
  name = "paris-01"
}

output "example_newt_id" {
  value = pangolin_site.example.newt_id
}

output "example_newt_secret" {
  value     = pangolin_site.example.newt_secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the site.

### Optional

- `docker_socket_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Docker socket access on this site. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The WireGuard address of the site.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the site.
- `newt_id` (String) The Newt client ID assigned to this site. Set at creation time.
- `newt_secret` (String, Sensitive) The Newt client secret assigned to this site. Set at creation time and not retrievable from the API afterwards. Not available after `terraform import`.
- `nice_id` (String) The human-readable ID of the site.
- `online` (Boolean) Whether the site is online.
- `type` (String) The type of the site (e.g. 'newt').
